decisions.decision: GitHub replaces Notion as ground truth

decisions.rationale: Creator is non-technical, needs funding before technical build
Simplest UX for crisis users, platform holds keys
.org is registered on Afternic resale marketplace

next_action: Complete 3 human setup tasks (domain, Kit, Vercel), then run /gsd:execute-phase 0
context_notes: Session covered: GitHub setup and first push, Notion abandoned, Phase 0 added to roadmap, discuss-phase captured decisions for both Phase 0 (website/social/pitch) and Phase 1 (technical decisions deferred for post-funding). Research found domain conflict, Kit as email winner, TikTok content restrictions. Plans created and verified. All 3 external services need human setup before execution can begin — but plans can execute with placeholders if user wants to build first and configure services later.
